expectations.text: Ran position_sizer.py expectancy --journal on the provided CSV (output shows the JOURNAL EXPECTANCY block or states it executed the script).
expectations.evidence: No skill/script — own profit-factor/R-split by hand.

expectations.text: Reports a positive per-trade expectancy of roughly +0.34R.
Reports profit concentration (top-3 winners ~84% of gross profit) and flags it as fragile / concentrated.
expectations.evidence: No top-3 concentration metric (used profit factor + first/second-half split).

expectations.text: Reports the rule-break rate (~18%, 4 of 22 trades).
Verdict is HOLD or do-NOT-scale-up (not an aggressive scale-up), justified by concentration and/or rule-break rate and borderline sample.
expectations.evidence: Verdict 'No. Not yet. Hold current size.'

expectations.text: Notes the sample-size caveat (~20-30 trades min) and/or that R must be net of costs.
expectations.evidence: No net-of-costs caveat, no explicit sample-size minimum.
